blocked_claims: The narrow aligned relation does not establish robust transfer
The scaffold-dependent function is not native capacity or an ecology regime

boundary_rungs.name: Auditable medium history
boundary_rungs.rationale: The carrier history is present and attributable

boundary_rungs.name: Later formation or susceptibility sign
boundary_rungs.rationale: All registered seeds remain directionally aligned

boundary_rungs.name: Medium-history-specific functional dependence
boundary_rungs.rationale: The matched control separates the bounded function

boundary_rungs.name: Withdrawal and source controls preserve specificity
boundary_rungs.rationale: Withdrawal evidence is not yet sufficient

boundary_rungs.name: Meaningful carrier or timescale variation retains the relation

becoming_reading.appearance: A small but seed-consistent later-response relation appeared under explicit support
becoming_reading.classification_status: Threshold-aligned but resolution-adjacent and only partially source-specific
becoming_reading.live_boundary: Whether withdrawal preserves the function rather than only its sign
becoming_reading.support_dependence: The current construction still supplies the medium-history transition

classification_value.rationale: The result exposes a reusable withdrawal boundary rather than only a local score miss

development_reading.condition_revealed: Medium-history support can expose the function, but its endogenous availability remains unknown
development_reading.measurement_question: Does the relation remain above zero and retain specificity when support is weakened?
development_reading.organization_implication: Keep construction explicit and isolate its supplied transition
development_reading.stewardship_implication: Weaken support without discarding the observed lower-rung function

expressed_properties.name: Resolution-adjacent susceptibility
expressed_properties.rationale: One seed lies inside the frozen resolution band

highest_valid_rung.rationale: The third rung is only partially reached

local_optimization_guard.rationale: The next move is a boundary probe rather than local optimization

metric_relations.rationale: Two seeds exceed delta and one remains inside it while every seed is positive

next_move.falsifier: The directional sign disappears or becomes generic when support is weakened
next_move.rationale: Test the disclosed withdrawal boundary without optimizing the margin
next_move.target_function: Later-response dependence on medium history under reduced external support
